title: China's Big Car Company BYD Says It Doesn't Need the US
summary: BYD is a car company from China that makes electric cars. Electric cars run on batteries instead of gas. Because gas prices are high, more people want electric cars. BYD is selling many cars in countries like Brazil and the UK. But BYD does not sell many cars in the United States. A leader at BYD said they can be successful without the US. BYD is also making new technology that lets cars charge very fast. This means drivers can add many miles of driving in just a few minutes. Many car companies showed their cars at the Beijing Auto Show in China. Chinese car companies are becoming more popular around the world. They are not just cheap anymore; they have good technology too.

keywords.explanation: a car that uses electricity instead of gas
to put electricity into a car's battery
new machines or ideas that make things better

options: They only sell in the US

How fast can flash charging add range?

background_read: Electric cars are becoming more popular because they help save money on gas and are better for the environment. China makes more electric cars than any other country. BYD is one of the biggest electric car companies in the world.
Article_Structure: WHO: BYD, a Chinese car company
WHAT: BYD says it can be successful without selling cars in the US
WHERE: In many countries like Brazil, UK, and Europe
WHY: Because high gas prices make people want electric cars, and BYD has good technology

perspectives.description: BYD thinks it can succeed without the US market because demand is high elsewhere.
The US has concerns about Chinese cars and has tariffs on them.
